mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tags t INNER JOIN file_tag_relation r ON t.id = r.tag_id WHERE r.file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY t.name

SELECT fm.id, fm.name, fm.parent_id, fm.parent_name, fm.folder, fm.size, fm.association, fm.current_version, fm.version_count, fm.created_by, fm.updated_by, fm.created, fm.updated FROM file_metadata fm INNER JOIN file_tag_relation r ON fm.id = r.file_id WHERE r.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY fm.updated DESC, fm.id DESC
